name: davinci-resolve-commander
title: DaVinci Resolve Commander
description: Searchable command palette for DaVinci Resolve — browse and execute 90+ keyboard shortcuts instantly
author: kevinmarchese

commands.name: index
commands.title: DaVinci Resolve Commands
commands.description: Search and execute DaVinci Resolve commands

commands.name: set-zoom
commands.title: Zoom
commands.description: Set zoom level on the selected DaVinci Resolve clip

commands.name: set-pan
commands.title: Pan
commands.description: Set pan position on the selected DaVinci Resolve clip

commands.name: set-rotation
commands.title: Rotation
commands.description: Set rotation angle on the selected DaVinci Resolve clip

commands.name: set-opacity
commands.title: Opacity
commands.description: Set opacity on the selected DaVinci Resolve clip

commands.name: effects
commands.title: Effects
commands.description: Browse and apply effects, titles, and generators to DaVinci Resolve clips
